basic_details.job_title: Central University of Rajasthan Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Rajasthan Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website of Central University of Rajasthan. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CURAJ Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Candidates with Master’s Degree with minimum 55% marks, UGC NET qualification or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018, and relevant professional experience are eligible to apply for these Assistant Professor vacancies. The walk-in interview process for CURAJ Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 29 May 2026, 01 June 202

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with minimum 55% marks, UGC NET qualified or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018, Two years professional experience for Management
qualification.details: Assistant Professor - Management: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A./ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent at master level and two years of professional experience after acquiring the degree of Master's degree. Minimum 60% marks in at least two preceding examinations before Master degree. Qualified UGC-National Eligibility Test (NET) in Management/relevant discipline or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Area of Specialization: Financial Management/Marketing Management/General Management Assistant Professor - English: Master Degree in English from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign University with at least 55% marks and at least 60% marks in at least two preceding examinations. Qualified UGC-National Eligibility Test (NET) in English or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Commerce: Master Degree in Commerce from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign University with at least 55% marks and at least 60% marks in at least two preceding examinations. Qualified UGC-National Eligibility Test (NET) in Commerce or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Area of Specialization: Accounting, Finance, General Management, Taxation

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor - Management: Rs. 60,000/- Per Month Assistant Professor - English: Rs. 60,000/- Per Month Assistant Professor - Commerce: Rs. 60,000/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions at the Central University of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with a minimum of 55% marks, be UGC NET qualified or hold a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. For Management, two years of professional experience is also required.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. When are the walk-in interviews scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on 29 May 2026 for Management, 01 June 2026 for Commerce, and 05 June 2026 for English.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable to SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per University/GOI rules.

faq.question: Q9. Which subjects are covered under the Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Assistant Professor in Management, English, and Commerce.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
